onboarding.title: Create your organization
onboarding.subtitle: Every HospiShift workspace is scoped to a tenant. Create one to continue.
onboarding.switchOrg: Or switch to an existing organization:

whatIs.title: What is HospiShift?
whatIs.body: HospiShift is a hospital shift management platform that helps you plan, track, and manage staff shifts, leaves, and swaps. It provides compliance tools to ensure fair scheduling and adherence to labour regulations.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.body: See an overview of coverage, upcoming shifts, leave requests, and pending swaps at a glance.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.body: Plan and manage daily shift assignments per department. Drag-and-drop support for quick scheduling.

staff.title: Staff
staff.body: Manage employee profiles, roles, contract types, and department assignments.

departments.title: Departments
departments.body: Organise your staff into cost centres (e.g. Emergency, Cardiology, Surgery) with coloured tags.

leaves.title: Leaves
leaves.body: Approve or decline leave requests and track employee absences.

swaps.title: Shift Swaps
swaps.body: Employees can request shift swaps; managers review and approve them with compliance checks.

fte.title: FTE (Full-Time Equivalent)
fte.body: A unit that measures the workload of an employee. 1.0 FTE = full-time, 0.5 FTE = half-time. Used to calculate coverage and staffing requirements.

costCenter.title: Cost Centre (Department)
costCenter.body: A department or unit within the hospital (e.g. Emergency, Cardiology). Each cost centre has its own shift schedule, budget, and staff assignments.

shiftTemplate.title: Shift Template
shiftTemplate.body: A predefined shift type with a code, start/end time, break duration, and night-flag. Examples: M (Morning 07–14), P (Afternoon 14–21), N (Night 21–07).

tenant.title: Tenant (Organisation)
tenant.body: A workspace representing a hospital or clinic. Each tenant has its own staff, departments, shift templates, and compliance rules. Users can belong to multiple tenants.

compliance.title: Compliance Rules
compliance.body: Automated checks that enforce labour regulations: minimum daily rest (11h), maximum weekly hours (48h), forbidden shift sequences (e.g. Night cannot be followed by Morning), and minimum weekly rest (35h).

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.body: Granular access controls per tenant. An admin can grant specific permissions (e.g. manage calendar, approve swaps) to individual users. Super admins can manage cross-tenant.

tenants.title: Tenants
tenants.body: Create and delete organisations. This is a super-admin feature available to users with the admin role.

compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.body: Configure rest rules, forbidden sequences, night shift windows, and auto-approval settings per tenant.

templates.title: Shift Templates
templates.body: Define the shift types available in your organisation (codes, times, breaks, night flags).

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.body: Assign granular permissions to users for each tenant (who can manage shifts, approve swaps, view staff, etc.).

staff.title: Staff
staff.body: Manage all employee records, including roles, contract types, FTE values, and department links.
